arc_position: 3rd / terminal: Elysia → photosynthetic human → Homo arboreus

\u0126_Chirality.reason: β-1,4-glycosidic cellulose; opposite chirality to α-1,4 glycogen/starch; deepest chirality change in series

\u03a9_Winding.reason: cellulose crystalline microfibril winding (parallel chains) PLUS thylakoid grana stacking = maximum Ω in this series

\u00d0_Dimensionality.reason: fractal branching architecture (WOX4/ARF5 lateral meristem); trees expand 3D indefinitely; animals centralize — dimensional architecture changes

\u03a3_Stoichiometry.reason: canopy-scale carbon fixation dominant; stomata enable direct CO2 uptake; mycorrhizal Pi import; new dominant stoichiometric class

\u03a6_Parity.reason: photosynthesis now PRIMARY metabolic mode (not supplement); full parity inversion — the organism is metabolically a plant more than an animal

\u00de_Topology.reason: fractal branching topology (branching trees = dendritic/fractal topology class); fundamentally distinct from bilateral animal body plan topology

mycorrhizal_frobenius.note: PT4 closes the Frobenius loop: G3P exported to Rhizophagus → Pi imported. C out ⊗ Pi in = identity. The mycorrhizal symbiosis is 400 million years old — it is the oldest μ∘δ=id in terrestrial biology.
mycorrhizal_frobenius.fungal_partner: Rhizophagus irregularis (default; 80% of land plants use AM fungi)

energy.note: With 8.5 m² of leaf-finger canopy area: ~20% energy autotrophy in full sun. Supplement from food for remaining fraction + cloudy days. Full autotrophy requires ~36 m² (large tree) — leaf-finger extensions are the architectural solution.

appearance.skin: bark-brown with green photosynthetic cortex visible through epidermis; branching venation pattern (leaf venation Turing)
appearance.fingers: elongated, flattened, deep green — leaf-finger panels
appearance.hair: replaced by light-gathering tendrils (Lhcb-expressing trichome-like structures)
appearance.stature: taller (WOX4 lateral meristem adds slow height); very slow aging

frobenius_note: Every layer closes: cellulose (CesA δ / cellulase μ), lignin (LAC17 δ / white-rot μ), mycorrhiza (C export δ / Pi import μ). The treople is not a fantasy. It is a grammar reading.
